programs.title: The Prestige
programs.desc: Rival 19th-century magicians engage in a bitter battle for trade secrets.

programs.title: The Kill Room
programs.desc: An art dealer teams up with a hit man and his boss for a money-laundering scheme.

programs.title: This Means War
programs.desc: Two CIA agents turn their deadly skills against each other after both fall for the same woman.

programs.title: Magic Mike
programs.desc: A male stripper takes a rookie under his wing and instructs him in the finer points of their trade.

programs.title: Magic Mike XXL
programs.desc: Former stripper Mike Lane (Channing Tatum) comes out of retirement to perform with his old crew.

programs.title: Super Troopers
programs.desc: Five state troopers (Jay Chandrasekhar, Kevin Heffernan, Steve Lemme) try to stop drug dealers.
